title: Liberty and Absurdity in 2026
abstract: As a U.S. citizen, why should I celebrate Independence Day this July 4, the ending of a war for liberties that are fading and against a tyranny that is gaining? I loved what this country stood for when I thought it stood for it, but what now? We won’t even give America club membership away for free
abstract_zh: 作为一名美国公民，为什么我在今年7月4日要庆祝独立日，这个结束为了自由而战的日子，而这些自由正在消逝，对抗的暴政却在增强？当我以为这个国家代表的是那些价值时，我爱它。但现在呢？我们甚至不会免费把美国当成俱乐部会员送给别人。
